# Multiple inclusion detection
# (Module state remains ZRBGC_* per BCG; external constants use RBGC_*)
test -z "${ZRBGC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBGC_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbgc_*)

zrbgc_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc already kindled"

  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX=10

  # Global resource validation patterns
  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS
  # Depot:  rbwg-d-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
  # Bucket: rbwg-b-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_BUCKET_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"

  # Basic Configuration
  readonly RBGC_ADMIN_ROLE="rbw-admin"
  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_ROLE="rbw-payor"
  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME="Recipe Bottle Payor"

  # Service Account Prefixes
  readonly RBGC_MASON_PREFIX="mason"

  # Timeouts
  readonly RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC=90
  readonly RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC=3
  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX=7
  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC=10

  # URL Roots & Well-known Endpoints
  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL="https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM="https://iam.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM="https://cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING="https://cloudbilling.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE="https://storage.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER="https://secretmanager.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_CONSOLE_URL="https://console.cloud.google.com/"
  readonly RBGC_SIGNUP_URL="https://cloud.google.com/free"

  # OAuth Scopes
  readonly RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM="https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform"

  # Service Usage Service Identifiers
  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_IAM="iam.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_CRM="cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="artifactregistry.googleapis.com"

  # Email/Domain Assembly
  readonly RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN="iam.gserviceaccount.com"

  # API Version Paths
  readonly RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1="/v1beta1"
  readonly RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1="/storage/v1"
  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_UPLOAD="/upload/storage/v1"
  readonly RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1="/v1"

  # REST Path Fragments
  readonly RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS="/projects"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS="/locations"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES="/repositories"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="/serviceAccounts"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_KEYS="/keys"

  # REST Operation Suffixes
  readonly RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":getIamPolicy"
  readonly RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":setIamPolicy"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX=":enable"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES="/services"

  # Operation Prefixes
  readonly RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL="operations/"

  # Ark Artifact Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
  # Each ark type is a plain basename sibling under <prefix>hallmarks/<hallmark>/.
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE="image"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT="about"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH="vouch"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS="diags"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST="attest"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_POUCH="pouch"

  # GAR Categorical Namespaces (₢A_AAK layout)
  # Top-level prefix-rooted namespaces under which hallmark/reliquary/enshrine
  # arks are stored as plain basename siblings. Consumed by rbgl_GarLayout.sh.
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS="hallmarks"
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_RELIQUARIES="reliquaries"
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_ENSHRINES="enshrines"

  # Reliquary Tool Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
  # Canonical tool names under <prefix>reliquaries/<date>/. Authoritative
  # manifest lives in rbgji/rbgji01-inscribe-mirror.sh.
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_GCLOUD="gcloud"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_DOCKER="docker"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_ALPINE="alpine"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SYFT="syft"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_BINFMT="binfmt"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SKOPEO="skopeo"

  # Fact-file filenames (written to BURD_OUTPUT_DIR by producers, read by tests)
  readonly RBF_FACT_HALLMARK="rbf_fact_hallmark"
  readonly RBF_FACT_BUILD_ID="rbf_fact_build_id"
  readonly RBF_FACT_GAR_ROOT="rbf_fact_gar_root"
  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_STEM="rbf_fact_ark_stem"
  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_YIELD="rbf_fact_ark_yield"
  readonly RBF_FACT_RELIQUARY="rbf_fact_reliquary"

  # Artifact Registry (GAR) Composition
  readonly RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX="-docker.pkg.dev"


  # Canonical Role IDs
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_READER="roles/artifactregistry.reader"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_WRITER="roles/artifactregistry.writer"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_ADMIN="roles/artifactregistry.admin"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CONTAINERANALYSIS_OCCURRENCES_VIEWER="roles/containeranalysis.occurrences.viewer"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CLOUDBUILD_BUILDS_EDITOR="roles/cloudbuild.builds.editor"

  # Common API Base Paths (project-independent)
  readonly RBGC_API_BASE_GCS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}"

  # Cloud Resource Manager - Liens API
  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_LIST_LIENS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_DELETE_LIEN="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"

  # Google Cloud Storage (GCS) APIs (project-independent)
  readonly RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS="${RBGC_API_BASE_GCS}/b"

  readonly RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM="linux/amd64"


  # Worker pool infrastructure (dual pools: tether + airgap)
  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER="-tether"
  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP="-airgap"
  readonly RBGC_WORKER_POOL_SUFFIX="-pool"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS="/workerPools"

  readonly ZRBGC_KINDLED=1
}

zrbgc_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgc not kindled - call zrbgc_kindle first"
}

# eof

400:rbgp_payor_install() {
564:  buc_info "Next: rbgp_depot_levy <depot-name> <region>"
565:  buc_info "  Example: rbgp_depot_levy dev us-central1"
568:rbgp_depot_levy() {
618:  local -r z_depot_project_id="${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-${z_depot_name}-${z_timestamp}"
620:  if test "${#z_depot_project_id}" -gt 30; then
621:    buc_die "Generated project ID too long (${#z_depot_project_id} > 30): ${z_depot_project_id}"
624:  buc_log_args "Generated depot project ID: ${z_depot_project_id}"
631:    --arg projectId "${z_depot_project_id}" \
659:  local -r z_billing_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING}${RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/billingInfo"
664:  local -r z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}"
676:    rbgu_api_enable "${z_service}" "${z_depot_project_id}" "${z_token}"
681:  local -r z_pool_parent="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/locations/${z_region}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}"
732:  local -r z_pool_resource="projects/${z_depot_project_id}/locations/${z_region}/workerPools/${z_pool_stem}"
739:  local -r z_preflight_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/locations/${z_region}/repositories"
748:    --arg project "${z_depot_project_id}" \
756:  local -r z_bucket_create_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b?project=${z_depot_project_id}"
769:  local -r z_parent="projects/${z_depot_project_id}/locations/${z_region}"
788:  local -r z_iam_preflight_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/serviceAccounts"
806:  local -r z_create_sa_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/serviceAccounts"
814:  local -r z_mason_sa_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/serviceAccounts/${z_mason_sa_email}"
819:  rbgi_add_repo_iam_role "${z_token}" "${z_depot_project_id}" "${z_mason_sa_email}" "${z_region}" "${z_repository_name}" \
826:  rbgi_add_project_iam_role "${z_token}" "Grant Mason Project Viewer" "projects/${z_depot_project_id}" \
830:  rbgi_add_project_iam_role "${z_token}" "Grant Mason Logs Writer" "projects/${z_depot_project_id}" \
838:  rbgu_provision_service_agent "cloudbuild" "${z_depot_project_id}" "${z_token}" > /dev/null \
853:  buc_bare "  RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID=${z_depot_project_id}"
861:rbgp_depot_unmake() {
864:  local -r z_depot_project_id="${1:-}"
871:  test -n "${z_depot_project_id}" || buc_die "Depot project ID required as first argument (current RBRR: ${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID})"
873:  buc_require "DANGER: Permanently destroy depot ${z_depot_project_id} and ALL resources" "${z_depot_project_id}"
883:  test -n "${z_depot_project_id}" || buc_die "Depot project ID required as first argument"
885:  local -r z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}"
901:  local -r z_liens_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens?parent=projects%2F${z_depot_project_id}"
927:  local -r z_billing_unlink_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING}${RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/billingInfo"
939:  local z_without_prefix="${z_depot_project_id#"${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-"}"
949:  local -r z_tether_del_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}/${z_tether_del_id}"
960:  local -r z_airgap_del_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}/${z_airgap_del_id}"
970:  local -r z_delete_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}"
1016:  buc_success "Depot ${z_depot_project_id} successfully marked for deletion"
1023:rbgp_depot_list() {
1109:rbgp_payor_oauth_refresh() {
1148:rbgp_governor_mantle() {
1151:  local -r z_depot_project_id="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
1159:  test -n "${z_depot_project_id}" || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is not set in regime configuration"
1161:  if ! [[ "${z_depot_project_id}" =~ ${RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_REGEX} ]]; then
1173:  local -r z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}"
1181:  test "${z_depot_project_id}" != "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}" || buc_die "Cannot create Governor in Payor project"
1184:  local -r z_sa_list_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/serviceAccounts"
1190:  local z_governor_emails
1194:  z_governor_emails=$(<"${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}")
1196:  if test -n "${z_governor_emails}"; then
1212:    done <<< "${z_governor_emails}"
1223:  local z_governor_email
1224:  z_governor_email=$(rbgu_sa_email_capture "${z_governor_account_id}" "${z_depot_project_id}") \
1244:  buc_log_args "Governor service account created: ${z_governor_email}"
1247:  local -r z_verify_url="${z_sa_list_url}/${z_governor_email}"
1257:    "projects/${z_depot_project_id}" \
1259:    "serviceAccount:${z_governor_email}" \
1266:  local -r z_key_url="${z_sa_list_url}/${z_governor_email}/keys"
1328:  buc_info "Governor service account: ${z_governor_email}"

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle GCP Constants - Implementation (no printf required)

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
# (Module state remains ZRBGC_* per BCG; external constants use RBGC_*)
test -z "${ZRBGC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBGC_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbgc_*)

zrbgc_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc already kindled"

  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX=10

  # Global resource validation patterns
  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS
  # Depot:  rbwg-d-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
  # Bucket: rbwg-b-[name]-YYMMDDHHMMSS
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_BUCKET_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET}-[a-z0-9-]+-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"

  # Basic Configuration
  readonly RBGC_ADMIN_ROLE="rbw-admin"
  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_ROLE="rbw-payor"
  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME="Recipe Bottle Payor"

  # Service Account Prefixes
  readonly RBGC_MASON_PREFIX="mason"

  # Timeouts
  readonly RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC=90
  readonly RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC=3
  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX=7
  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC=10

  # URL Roots & Well-known Endpoints
  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL="https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM="https://iam.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM="https://cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING="https://cloudbilling.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE="https://storage.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER="https://secretmanager.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_CONSOLE_URL="https://console.cloud.google.com/"
  readonly RBGC_SIGNUP_URL="https://cloud.google.com/free"

  # OAuth Scopes
  readonly RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM="https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform"

  # Service Usage Service Identifiers
  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_IAM="iam.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_CRM="cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="artifactregistry.googleapis.com"

  # Email/Domain Assembly
  readonly RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN="iam.gserviceaccount.com"

  # API Version Paths
  readonly RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1="/v1beta1"
  readonly RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1="/storage/v1"
  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_UPLOAD="/upload/storage/v1"
  readonly RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1="/v1"

  # REST Path Fragments
  readonly RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS="/projects"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS="/locations"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES="/repositories"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="/serviceAccounts"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_KEYS="/keys"

  # REST Operation Suffixes
  readonly RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":getIamPolicy"
  readonly RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":setIamPolicy"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX=":enable"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES="/services"

  # Operation Prefixes
  readonly RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL="operations/"

  # Ark Artifact Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
  # Each ark type is a plain basename sibling under <prefix>hallmarks/<hallmark>/.
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE="image"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT="about"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH="vouch"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS="diags"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST="attest"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_POUCH="pouch"

  # GAR Categorical Namespaces (₢A_AAK layout)
  # Top-level prefix-rooted namespaces under which hallmark/reliquary/enshrine
  # arks are stored as plain basename siblings. Consumed by rbgl_GarLayout.sh.
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS="hallmarks"
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_RELIQUARIES="reliquaries"
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_ENSHRINES="enshrines"

  # Reliquary Tool Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
  # Canonical tool names under <prefix>reliquaries/<date>/. Authoritative
  # manifest lives in rbgji/rbgji01-inscribe-mirror.sh.
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_GCLOUD="gcloud"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_DOCKER="docker"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_ALPINE="alpine"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SYFT="syft"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_BINFMT="binfmt"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SKOPEO="skopeo"

  # Fact-file filenames (written to BURD_OUTPUT_DIR by producers, read by tests)
  readonly RBF_FACT_HALLMARK="rbf_fact_hallmark"
  readonly RBF_FACT_BUILD_ID="rbf_fact_build_id"
  readonly RBF_FACT_GAR_ROOT="rbf_fact_gar_root"
  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_STEM="rbf_fact_ark_stem"
  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_YIELD="rbf_fact_ark_yield"
  readonly RBF_FACT_RELIQUARY="rbf_fact_reliquary"

  # Artifact Registry (GAR) Composition
  readonly RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX="-docker.pkg.dev"


  # Canonical Role IDs
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_READER="roles/artifactregistry.reader"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_WRITER="roles/artifactregistry.writer"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_ADMIN="roles/artifactregistry.admin"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CONTAINERANALYSIS_OCCURRENCES_VIEWER="roles/containeranalysis.occurrences.viewer"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CLOUDBUILD_BUILDS_EDITOR="roles/cloudbuild.builds.editor"

  # Common API Base Paths (project-independent)
  readonly RBGC_API_BASE_GCS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}"

  # Cloud Resource Manager - Liens API
  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_LIST_LIENS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_DELETE_LIEN="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"

  # Google Cloud Storage (GCS) APIs (project-independent)
  readonly RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS="${RBGC_API_BASE_GCS}/b"

  readonly RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM="linux/amd64"


  # Worker pool infrastructure (dual pools: tether + airgap)
  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER="-tether"
  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP="-airgap"
  readonly RBGC_WORKER_POOL_SUFFIX="-pool"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS="/workerPools"

  readonly ZRBGC_KINDLED=1
}

zrbgc_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgc not kindled - call zrbgc_kindle first"
}

# eof

stamped with a
{rbtga_hallmark}
on each successful build.
+
A vessel's regime file (`rbrv.env`) declares its mode, Dockerfile path (conjure), upstream reference (bind), or local image (graft), along with platform targets and build configuration.
The vessel name appears in all artifact tags as the stem before the hallmark.

=== Foundry Fact Files

[[rbf_fact_hallmark]]
//axpof_fact
{rbf_fact_hallmark}::
Hallmark string.

[[rbf_fact_build_id]]
//axpof_fact
{rbf_fact_build_id}::
Cloud Build job ID.

[[rbf_fact_gar_root]]
//axpof_fact
{rbf_fact_gar_root}::
GAR registry root path.

[[rbf_fact_ark_stem]]
//axpof_fact
{rbf_fact_ark_stem}::
Hallmark subtree prefix — `«PREFIX»hallmarks/«HALLMARK»`.
Composable with basename and `:«HALLMARK»` tag for full artifact references.

[[rbf_fact_ark_yield]]
//axpof_fact
{rbf_fact_ark_yield}::
Per-platform image reference.

[[rbf_fact_reliquary]]
//axpof_fact
{rbf_fact_reliquary}::
Reliquary datestamp (`r` + `YYMMDDHHMMSS`).
Written by {rbtgo_depot_inscribe} on successful Cloud Build submission.

[[rbtgr_build_json]]
//axl_voices axig_build_config
{rbtgr_build_json}::
The generated `cloudbuild.json` for a vessel, produced from step scripts and regime pins by the stitch function.
All values resolved directly at stitch time — no placeholders, no post-processing.
Submitted via `builds.create` API. Build context delivered via {rbtga_ark_pouch}.
See <<rbscj_trade_study>>.

[[rbtgr_provenance]]

content.content:
1995	/// Matches RBCC_BOTTLE_TEST_READINESS_DELAY_SEC from rbcc_Constants.sh.
1996	pub const RBTDRC_SERVICE_READINESS_DELAY_SECS: u64 = 30;
1997	
1998	/// Returns whether this fixture uses the crucible charge/quench lifecycle.
1999	pub fn rbtdrc_needs_charge(fixture: &str) -> bool {
2000	    matches!(
2001	        fixture,
2002	        crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_TADMOR
2003	            | crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_SRJCL
2004	            | crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_PLUML
2005	    )
2006	}
2007	
2008	/// Returns whether this fixture needs a post-charge readiness delay.
2009	pub fn rbtdrc_needs_readiness_delay(fixture: &str) -> bool {
2010	    matches!(
2011	        fixture,
2012	        crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_SRJCL
2013	            | crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_PLUML
2014	    )
2015	}
2016	
2017	/// Returns whether full-fixture mode should abort after the first failed case.
2018	/// The pristine-lifecycle gate (case 1) gates the rest of the fixture: if it
2019	/// fails, subsequent SA/depot lifecycle cases would burn quota chasing a
2020	/// non-pristine state, so we short-circuit.
2021	pub fn rbtdrc_fixture_fail_fast(fixture: &str) -> bool {
2022	    matches!(
2023	        fixture,
2024	        crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_PRISTINE_LIFECYCLE
2025	    )
2026	}
2027	
2028	/// Returns the section array appropriate for the given fixture.
2029	pub fn rbtdrc_sections_for_fixture(fixture: &str) -> &'static [rbtdre_Section] {
2030	    match fixture {
2031	        crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_TADMOR => RBTDRC_SECTIONS_TADMOR,
2032	        crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_SRJCL => RBTDRC_SECTIONS_SRJCL,
2033	        crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_PLUML => RBTDRC_SECTIONS_PLUML,
2034	        crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_FOUR_MODE => RBTDRC_SECTIONS_FOUR_MODE,
2035	        crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_BATCH_VOUCH => RBTDRC_SECTIONS_BATCH_VOUCH,
2036	        crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_ACCESS_PROBE => RBTDRC_SECTIONS_ACCESS_PROBE,
2037	        crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_ENROLLMENT_VALIDATION => crate::rbtdrf_fast::RBTDRF_SECTIONS_ENROLLMENT_VALIDATION,
2038	        crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_REGIME_VALIDATION => crate::rbtdrf_fast::RBTDRF_SECTIONS_REGIME_VALIDATION,
2039	        crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_REGIME_SMOKE => crate::rbtdrf_fast::RBTDRF_SECTIONS_REGIME_SMOKE,
2040	        crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_HANDBOOK_RENDER => crate::rbtdrf_handbook::RBTDRF_SECTIONS_HANDBOOK_RENDER,
2041	        crate::rbtdrm_manifest::RBTDRM_FIXTURE_PRISTINE_LIFECYCLE => crate::rbtdrp_pristine::RBTDRP_SECTIONS_PRISTINE_LIFECYCLE,
2042	        _ => {

rbgp_depot_levy() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

  local -r z_depot_name="${1:-}"
  local -r z_region="${RBRR_GCP_REGION}"

  buc_doc_brief "Create new depot infrastructure following RBAGS specification"
  buc_doc_param "depot_name" "Depot name (lowercase/numbers/hyphens, max ${RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX} chars)"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step 'Validate input parameters'
  test -n "${z_depot_name}" || buc_die "Depot name required as first argument"
  
  if ! [[ "${z_depot_name}" =~ ^[a-z0-9-]+$ ]]; then
    buc_die "Depot name must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens"
  fi
  
  if test "${#z_depot_name}" -gt "${RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX}"; then
    buc_die "Depot name must be ${RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX} characters or less"
  fi

  # Validate region exists in Artifact Registry locations
  buc_log_args 'Validating region exists in Artifact Registry locations'
  local z_token
  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor for region validation"

  local -r z_locations_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/projects/${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}/locations"
  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_locations_url}" "${z_token}" "region_validation"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Validate region" "region_validation"
  
  local z_valid_regions
  z_valid_regions=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "region_validation" '.locations[].locationId' | tr '\n' ' ') || buc_die "Failed to parse region list"
  
  if ! [[ " ${z_valid_regions} " =~ [[:space:]]${z_region}[[:space:]] ]]; then
    buc_die "Invalid region. Valid regions: ${z_valid_regions}"
  fi

  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
  test -n "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID is not set"
  test -n "${RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID is not set"
  test -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID is not set"
  
  local z_token
  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"

  buc_step 'Generate depot project ID'
  local z_timestamp
  date "${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT}" > "${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to generate timestamp"
  z_timestamp=$(<"${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}")

rbgg_forfeit_service_account() {
  zrbgg_sentinel

  local z_sa_email="${1:-}"

  buc_doc_brief "Forfeit a service account"
  buc_doc_param "email" "Email address of the service account to forfeit"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  test -n "${z_sa_email}" || buc_die "Service account email required"

  buc_step "Forfeiting service account: ${z_sa_email}"

  buc_log_args 'Get OAuth token from admin'
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"

  buc_log_args 'Delete via REST API'
  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_sa_email}" "${z_token}" \
                                                 "${ZRBGG_INFIX_DELETE}"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Delete service account" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_DELETE}" \
    404 "not found (already deleted)"

  buc_success "Forfeit operation completed"
}

rbgg_destroy_project() {
  zrbgg_sentinel
  buc_doc_brief "DEPRECATED: Use rbgp_project_delete instead - moved to Payor module for billing/destructive ops"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

30	zrbgp_kindle() {
31	  test -z "${ZRBGP_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgp already kindled"
32	
33	  buc_log_args "Ensure dependencies are kindled first"
34	  zrbgc_sentinel
35	  zrbgo_sentinel
36	  zrbgu_sentinel
37	  zrbgi_sentinel
38	
39	  readonly ZRBGP_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_"
40	  readonly ZRBGP_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGP_PREFIX}empty.json"
41	  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGP_EMPTY_JSON}"
42	
43	  readonly ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_scratch.txt"
44	
45	  # Infix values for HTTP operations
46	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_DELETE="project_delete"
47	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_RESTORE="project_restore"
48	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE="project_state"
49	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_LIST_LIENS="list_liens"
50	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_DELETE_LIEN="delete_lien"
51	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_BILLING_ATTACH="billing_attach"
52	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_BILLING_DETACH="billing_detach"
53	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_CREATE_REPO="create_repo"
54	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_VERIFY_REPO="verify_repo"
55	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO="project_info"
56	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE="bucket_create"
57	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_API_CHECK="api_checking"
58	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_LIST_SA="gov_list_sa"
59	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_DELETE_SA="gov_delete_sa"
60	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_CREATE_SA="gov_create_sa"
61	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_VERIFY_SA="gov_verify_sa"
62	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_KEY="gov_key"
63	  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_IAM="gov_iam"
64	
65	  readonly ZRBGP_KINDLED=1
66	}
67	
68	zrbgp_sentinel() {
69	  test "${ZRBGP_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgp not kindled - call zrbgp_kindle first"
70	}
71	
72	
73	######################################################################
74	# OAuth Authentication Functions (zrbgp_oauth_*)
75	
76	zrbgp_refresh_capture() {
77	  zrbgp_sentinel
78	
79	  # RBRO credentials already loaded and validated by caller (rbgu_rbro_load)
80	  zrbro_sentinel
81	  test -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID not set in environment"
82	
83	  buc_log_args "Exchanging refresh token for access token"
84	
85	  # Build request and pipe to curl - secrets never touch disk
86	  local z_response
87	  z_response=$(jq -n \
88	    --arg refresh_token "${RBRO_REFRESH_TOKEN}" \
89	    --arg client_id "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID}" \
90	    --arg client_secret "${RBRO_CLIENT_SECRET}" \
91	    --arg grant_type "refresh_token" \
92	    '{
93	      refresh_token: $refresh_token,
94	      client_id: $client_id,
95	      client_secret: $client_secret,
96	      grant_type: $grant_type
97	    }' | curl -sS -X POST \
98	      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \

zrbgp_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBGP_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgp already kindled"

  buc_log_args "Ensure dependencies are kindled first"
  zrbgc_sentinel
  zrbgo_sentinel
  zrbgu_sentinel
  zrbgi_sentinel

  readonly ZRBGP_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_"
  readonly ZRBGP_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGP_PREFIX}empty.json"
  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGP_EMPTY_JSON}"

  readonly ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_scratch.txt"

  # Infix values for HTTP operations
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_DELETE="project_delete"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_RESTORE="project_restore"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE="project_state"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_LIST_LIENS="list_liens"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_DELETE_LIEN="delete_lien"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_BILLING_ATTACH="billing_attach"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_BILLING_DETACH="billing_detach"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_CREATE_REPO="create_repo"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_VERIFY_REPO="verify_repo"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO="project_info"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE="bucket_create"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_API_CHECK="api_checking"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_LIST_SA="gov_list_sa"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_DELETE_SA="gov_delete_sa"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_CREATE_SA="gov_create_sa"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_VERIFY_SA="gov_verify_sa"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_KEY="gov_key"
  readonly ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_IAM="gov_iam"

  readonly ZRBGP_KINDLED=1
}

zrbgp_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBGP_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgp not kindled - call zrbgp_kindle first"
}


######################################################################
# OAuth Authentication Functions (zrbgp_oauth_*)

zrbgp_refresh_capture() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

  # RBRO credentials already loaded and validated by caller (rbgu_rbro_load)
  zrbro_sentinel
  test -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID not set in environment"

  buc_log_args "Exchanging refresh token for access token"

  # Build request and pipe to curl - secrets never touch disk
  local z_response
  z_response=$(jq -n \
    --arg refresh_token "${RBRO_REFRESH_TOKEN}" \
    --arg client_id "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID}" \
    --arg client_secret "${RBRO_CLIENT_SECRET}" \
    --arg grant_type "refresh_token" \
    '{
      refresh_token: $refresh_token,
      client_id: $client_id,
      client_secret: $client_secret,
      grant_type: $grant_type
    }' | curl -sS -X POST \
      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#

#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Regime Repo - Validator Module

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZRBRR_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrr multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBRR_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbrr_*)

zrbrr_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBRR_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbrr already kindled"

  # No defaults set — buv uses ${!varname:-} for safe indirect expansion under set -u.
  # Unset variables are detected distinctly from empty by zbuv_check_capture.

  # Enroll all RBRR variables — single source of truth for validation and rendering

  buv_regime_enroll RBRR

  buv_group_enroll "Resource Prefixing"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX         2   11  "Prefix prepended to cloud-visible resource names (GAR, Cloud Build, GCP)"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX       2   11  "Prefix prepended to local container and network names"

  buv_group_enroll "Vessel and Local Configuration"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_VESSEL_DIR           1  255  "Vessel definitions directory"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_BOTTLE_WORKSPACE     1   64  "Container workspace path for bottle working directory"
  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRR_DNS_SERVER                   "DNS server for containers"

  buv_group_enroll "GCP Infrastructure"
  buv_gname_enroll   RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID         6   63  "GCP project ID for depot"
  buv_gname_enroll   RBRR_GCP_REGION               1   32  "GCP region"
  buv_gname_enroll   RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY           1   63  "Google Artifact Registry repository name"

  buv_group_enroll "Google Cloud Build Configuration"
  buv_gname_enroll   RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE           3   64  "Machine type for Cloud Build (CE format)"
  buv_gname_enroll   RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM                1   63  "Worker pool base name (suffixed with -tether/-airgap)"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT                2   10  "Build timeout (e.g., 1200s)"
  buv_decimal_enroll RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS  1  999  "Min concurrent builds required"

  buv_group_enroll "Secrets Directory"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_SECRETS_DIR              1  512  "Directory containing credential files"

  buv_group_enroll "Public Docs"
  buv_string_enroll  RBRR_PUBLIC_DOCS_URL          1  512  "Public docs URL — readme target for buh_tlt glossary links, updated per-release or per-incorporation"

  # Guard against unexpected RBRR_ variables not in enrollment
  buv_scope_sentinel RBRR RBRR_

  # Build docker env args array from validated values
  # Usage: docker run "${ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" ...
  ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV=("-e" "RBRR_DNS_SERVER=${RBRR_DNS_SERVER}")
  readonly ZRBRR_DOCKER_ENV

  # Lock all enrolled RBRR_ variables against mutation
  buv_lock RBRR

  readonly ZRBRR_KINDLED=1
}

zrbrr_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBRR_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrr not kindled - call zrbrr_kindle first"
}

# Enforce all RBRR enrollment validations and custom format checks
zrbrr_enforce() {
  zrbrr_sentinel

  buv_vet RBRR

  buv_dir_exists "${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}"
  buv_dir_exists "${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}"

  [[ "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" =~ ^[0-9]+s$ ]] \
    || buc_die "Invalid RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT format: ${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT} (expected NNNs)"

  [[ "${RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM}" =~ ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]+$ ]] \
    || buc_die "Invalid RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM format: ${RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM} (expected lowercase pool base name)"

  [[ "${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}"   =~ ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*-$ ]] \
    || buc_die "Invalid RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX format: ${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}   (expected lowercase starting with letter, ending in hyphen)"

  [[ "${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX}" =~ ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*-$ ]] \
    || buc_die "Invalid RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX format: ${RBRR_RUNTIME_PREFIX} (expected lowercase starting with letter, ending in hyphen)"

}

# eof

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle GCP Payor - Billing and Destructive Operations CLI

set -euo pipefail

source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buc_command.sh"

zrbgp_furnish() {
  buc_doc_env "BURD_BUK_DIR          " "BUK module directory (dispatch-provided)"
  buc_doc_env "BURD_TOOLS_DIR        " "Project tools root directory (dispatch-provided)"
  buc_doc_env_done || return 0

  local z_command="${1:-}"

  source "${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/rbbc_constants.sh"
  local z_rbk_kit_dir="${BURD_TOOLS_DIR}/${RBBC_kit_subdir}"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/burd_regime.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buv_validation.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buh_handbook.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgc_Constants.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbrr_regime.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbdc_DerivedConstants.sh"
  source "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgo_OAuth.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgu_Utility.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgi_IAM.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbrp_regime.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgp_Payor.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buz_zipper.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbz_zipper.sh"

  buc_log_args 'Initialize modules'
  zbuv_kindle
  zburd_kindle
  zrbcc_kindle

  zrbrr_kindle
  # Differential furnish: depot_levy establishes the depot — skip enforce
  # which requires RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID and other fields it will populate.
  case "${z_command}" in
    rbgp_depot_levy) ;;
    *)                 zrbrr_enforce ;;
  esac
  zrbdc_kindle

  zrbgc_kindle

  source "${RBBC_rbrp_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source RBRP: ${RBBC_rbrp_file}"
  zrbrp_kindle
  zrbrp_enforce

  zrbgo_kindle
  zrbgu_kindle
  zrbgi_kindle
  zrbgp_kindle

  zbuz_kindle
  zrbz_kindle
}

buc_execute rbgp_ "Recipe Bottle Payor" zrbgp_furnish "$@"

rbgp_depot_unmake() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

  local -r z_depot_project_id="${1:-}"

  buc_doc_brief "DANGER: Permanently destroy an entire depot infrastructure"
  buc_doc_param "depot_project_id" "The depot project ID to destroy"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step 'Safety confirmation required'
  test -n "${z_depot_project_id}" || buc_die "Depot project ID required as first argument (current RBRR: ${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID})"

  buc_require "DANGER: Permanently destroy depot ${z_depot_project_id} and ALL resources" "${z_depot_project_id}"

  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
  test -n "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID is not set"
  test -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID is not set"
  
  local z_token
  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"

  buc_step 'Validate target depot'
  test -n "${z_depot_project_id}" || buc_die "Depot project ID required as first argument"

  local -r z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}"
  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_validate"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Validate depot project" "depot_destroy_validate"
  
  local z_lifecycle_state
  z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_validate" '.state // "UNKNOWN"') || buc_die "Failed to parse project state"
  
  if test "${z_lifecycle_state}" != "ACTIVE"; then
    if test "${z_lifecycle_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
      buc_die "Project already marked for deletion"
    else
      buc_die "Project state is ${z_lifecycle_state} - can only destroy ACTIVE projects"
    fi
  fi

  buc_step 'Check for and remove liens'
  local -r z_liens_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens?parent=projects%2F${z_depot_project_id}"
  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_liens_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_liens_list"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "List liens" "depot_destroy_liens_list"
  
  local z_lien_count
  z_lien_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_liens_list" '.liens // [] | length') || buc_die "Failed to parse liens response"
  
  if test "${z_lien_count}" -gt 0; then
    buc_log_args "Found ${z_lien_count} lien(s) - removing them"
    local z_lien_names
    z_lien_names=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_liens_list" '.liens[].name' | tr '\n' ' ') || buc_die "Failed to extract lien names"
    
    for z_lien_name in ${z_lien_names}; do
      if test -n "${z_lien_name}"; then
        buc_log_args "Removing lien: ${z_lien_name}"
        local z_delete_lien_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens/${z_lien_name}"
        rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_lien_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_lien_delete"
        rbgu_http_require_ok "Delete lien" "depot_destroy_lien_delete"
      fi
    done
  fi

  buc_step 'Unlink billing account (releases quota immediately)'
  local -r z_billing_unlink_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_billing_unlink.json"
  echo '{"billingAccountName":""}' > "${z_billing_unlink_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build billing unlink body"

  local -r z_billing_unlink_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING}${RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/billingInfo"
  rbgu_http_json "PUT" "${z_billing_unlink_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_billing_unlink" "${z_billing_unlink_body}"

  local z_billing_unlink_code
  z_billing_unlink_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_billing_unlink") || z_billing_unlink_code=""
  if test "${z_billing_unlink_code}" = "200"; then
    buc_log_args "Billing account unlinked - quota released"
  else
    buc_warn "Could not unlink billing (HTTP ${z_billing_unlink_code}) - proceeding with deletion anyway"
  fi

  # Extract depot name from project ID for resource naming
  local z_without_prefix="${z_depot_project_id#"${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT}-"}"
  local z_name_len=${#z_without_prefix}
  local z_ts_suffix_len=$((1 + RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN))
  local -r z_depot_name="${z_without_prefix:0:$((z_name_len - z_ts_suffix_len))}"

  buc_step 'Delete dual worker pools (if exist)'
  local -r z_pool_stem="rbw-${z_depot_name}${RBGC_WORKER_POOL_SUFFIX}"

  # Delete tether pool
  local -r z_tether_del_id="${z_pool_stem}${RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER}"
  local -r z_tether_del_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}/${z_tether_del_id}"
  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_tether_del_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_pool_tether"
  local z_tether_del_code
  z_tether_del_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_pool_tether") || z_tether_del_code=""
  case "${z_tether_del_code}" in
    200|204|404) buc_log_args "Tether pool ${z_tether_del_id} cleanup: HTTP ${z_tether_del_code}" ;;
    *) buc_warn "Tether pool cleanup failed: HTTP ${z_tether_del_code} — proceeding" ;;
  esac

  # Delete airgap pool
  local -r z_airgap_del_id="${z_pool_stem}${RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP}"
  local -r z_airgap_del_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}/${z_airgap_del_id}"
  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_airgap_del_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_pool_airgap"
  local z_airgap_del_code
  z_airgap_del_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_pool_airgap") || z_airgap_del_code=""
  case "${z_airgap_del_code}" in
    200|204|404) buc_log_args "Airgap pool ${z_airgap_del_id} cleanup: HTTP ${z_airgap_del_code}" ;;
    *) buc_warn "Airgap pool cleanup failed: HTTP ${z_airgap_del_code} — proceeding" ;;
  esac

  buc_step 'Initiate depot deletion'
  local -r z_delete_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}"
  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_delete"
  
  local z_delete_response
  z_delete_response=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_delete") || buc_die "Failed to get deletion response code"
  
  if test "${z_delete_response}" = "200" || test "${z_delete_response}" = "204"; then
    buc_log_args "Project deletion initiated successfully"
  else
    local z_error_msg
    z_error_msg=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_delete" '.error.message // "Unknown error"') || z_error_msg="HTTP ${z_delete_response}"
    buc_die "Failed to initiate project deletion: ${z_error_msg}"
  fi

  buc_step 'Verify deletion state transition'
  local -r z_max_attempts=12
  local z_attempt=1
  local z_final_state
  
  while test "${z_attempt}" -le "${z_max_attempts}"; do
    sleep 5
    buc_log_args "Checking deletion state (attempt ${z_attempt}/${z_max_attempts})"
    
    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_state_check"

    local z_state_check_code
    z_state_check_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_state_check") || z_state_check_code=""
    if test "${z_state_check_code}" = "200"; then
      z_final_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_state_check" '.state // "UNKNOWN"') || z_final_state="UNKNOWN"

      if test "${z_final_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
        break
      fi
    fi
    
    z_attempt=$((z_attempt + 1))
  done
  
  if test "${z_final_state}" != "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
    buc_die "Failed to verify deletion state transition. Current state: ${z_final_state}"
  fi

  buc_step 'Update depot tracking'
  zrbgp_depot_list_update || buc_log_args "Warning: Failed to update depot tracking after deletion"

  # Success
  buc_success "Depot ${z_depot_project_id} successfully marked for deletion"
  buc_info "Project Status: DELETE_REQUESTED"
  buc_info "Billing: Unlinked (quota released immediately)"
  buc_info "Grace period: Up to 30 days before permanent removal"
  buc_info "All infrastructure (Mason SA, repository, bucket) will be automatically removed"
}

rbgp_depot_list() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "List all depot instances and their status"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'

set -euo pipefail

source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buc_command.sh"

zrbgg_furnish() {
  buc_doc_env "BURD_BUK_DIR          " "BUK module directory (dispatch-provided)"
  buc_doc_env "BURD_TOOLS_DIR        " "Project tools root directory (dispatch-provided)"
  buc_doc_env "BURD_TEMP_DIR         " "Temporary directory for intermediate files"
  buc_doc_env "BURD_OUTPUT_DIR       " "Directory for command outputs"
  buc_doc_env_done || return 0

  source "${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/rbbc_constants.sh"
  local z_rbk_kit_dir="${BURD_TOOLS_DIR}/${RBBC_kit_subdir}"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buv_validation.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/burd_regime.sh"

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2026 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# RBTE Engine - Theurge test engine implementation module
20	#
21	# BCG module providing kindle/sentinel/public functions for theurge
22	# Rust build, test, and orchestration commands.
23	
24	set -euo pipefail
25	
26	# Multiple inclusion guard
27	test -z "${ZRBTE_SOURCED:-}" || return 0
28	ZRBTE_SOURCED=1
29	
30	######################################################################
31	# Kindle
32	
33	zrbte_kindle() {
34	  test -z "${ZRBTE_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "rbte already kindled"
35	
36	  local z_dir="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
37	
38	  readonly RBTE_MANIFEST="${z_dir}/Cargo.toml"
39	  readonly ZRBTE_BINARY="${z_dir}/target/debug/rbtd"
40	
41	  # Theurge-own colophons (routed by rbte_dispatch, not the RBK zipper)
42	  readonly ZRBTE_COLOPHONS="rbtd-ap"
43	
44	  # Combined manifest: RBK zipper colophons + theurge-own colophons
45	  readonly ZRBTE_FULL_MANIFEST="${ZRBZ_COLOPHON_MANIFEST} ${ZRBTE_COLOPHONS}"
46	
47	  # Suite-to-fixture mappings
48	  ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST=("enrollment-validation" "regime-validation" "regime-smoke" "handbook-render")
49	  ZRBTE_SUITE_SERVICE=("${ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST[@]}" "access-probe" "four-mode" "batch-vouch")
50	  ZRBTE_SUITE_CRUCIBLE=("${ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST[@]}" "tadmor" "srjcl" "pluml")
51	  ZRBTE_SUITE_COMPLETE=("${ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST[@]}" "access-probe" "four-mode" "batch-vouch" "tadmor" "srjcl" "pluml")
52	
53	  readonly ZRBTE_KINDLED=1
54	}
55	
56	######################################################################
57	# Sentinel
58	
59	zrbte_sentinel() {
60	  test "${ZRBTE_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbte not kindled - call zrbte_kindle first"
61	}
62	
63	######################################################################
64	# Internal helpers
65	
66	zrbte_build_binary() {
67	  zrbte_sentinel
68	
69	  buc_step "Building theurge"
70	  cargo build --manifest-path "${RBTE_MANIFEST}" || buc_die "cargo build failed"
71	  test -x "${ZRBTE_BINARY}" || buc_die "Theurge binary not found: ${ZRBTE_BINARY}"
72	}
73	
74	zrbte_resolve_suite() {
75	  local z_suite="$1"
76	  case "${z_suite}" in
77	    fast)     echo "${ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST[*]}" ;;
78	    service)  echo "${ZRBTE_SUITE_SERVICE[*]}" ;;
79	    crucible) echo "${ZRBTE_SUITE_CRUCIBLE[*]}" ;;
80	    complete) echo "${ZRBTE_SUITE_COMPLETE[*]}" ;;
81	    *)        buc_die "Unknown suite: ${z_suite} (expected fast|service|crucible|complete)" ;;
82	  esac
83	}
84	
85	######################################################################
86	# Public functions
87	
88	rbte_build() {
89	  zrbte_sentinel
90	
91	  buc_step "Building theurge"
92	  buc_log_args "Manifest: ${RBTE_MANIFEST}"
93	  cargo build --manifest-path "${RBTE_MANIFEST}" "$@" || buc_die "cargo build failed"
94	  buc_success "Theurge built"
95	}
96	
97	rbte_test() {
98	  zrbte_sentinel
99	
100	  buc_step "Testing theurge"
101	  buc_log_args "Manifest: ${RBTE_MANIFEST}"
102	  cargo test --manifest-path "${RBTE_MANIFEST}" "$@" || buc_die "cargo test failed"
103	  buc_success "All theurge tests passed"
104	}
105	
106	rbte_run() {
107	  zrbte_sentinel
108	
109	  local z_fixture="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
110	  test -n "${z_fixture}" || buc_die "No fixture imprint — use tabtarget with imprint (e.g. rbtd-r.Run.tadmor.sh)"
111	
112	  zrbte_build_binary
113	
114	  buc_step "Running theurge fixture '${z_fixture}'"
115	  "${ZRBTE_BINARY}" "${ZRBTE_FULL_MANIFEST}" "${z_fixture}"
116	}
117	
118	rbte_suite() {
119	  zrbte_sentinel
120	
121	  local z_suite="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
122	  test -n "${z_suite}" || buc_die "No suite imprint — use tabtarget with imprint (e.g. rbtd-s.TestSuite.fast.sh)"
123	
124	  local z_fixture_list
125	  z_fixture_list="$(zrbte_resolve_suite "${z_suite}")"
126	
127	  zrbte_build_binary
128	
129	  local z_count=0
130	  local z_fixture
131	  for z_fixture in ${z_fixture_list}; do
132	    buc_step "Running theurge fixture '${z_fixture}'"
133	    "${ZRBTE_BINARY}" "${ZRBTE_FULL_MANIFEST}" "${z_fixture}"
134	    z_count=$((z_count + 1))
135	  done
136	
137	  buc_success "Suite '${z_suite}' complete (${z_count} fixtures)"
138	}
139	
140	rbte_single() {
141	  zrbte_sentinel
142	
143	  local z_fixture="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
144	  test -n "${z_fixture}" || buc_die "No fixture imprint — use tabtarget with imprint (e.g. rbtd-s.SingleCase.tadmor.sh)"
145	
146	  zrbte_build_binary
147	
148	  local z_case="${1:-}"
149	  "${ZRBTE_BINARY}" single "${ZRBTE_FULL_MANIFEST}" "${z_fixture}" ${z_case:+"${z_case}"}
150	}
151	
152	rbte_probe() {
153	  zrbte_sentinel
154	
155	  local z_role="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
156	  test -n "${z_role}" || buc_die "No role imprint — use tabtarget with imprint (e.g. rbtd-ap.AccessProbe.governor.sh)"
157	
158	  local z_iterations=5
159	  local z_delay_ms=1500
160	
161	  case "${z_role}" in
162	    governor|director|retriever)
163	      buc_step "JWT SA access probe: ${z_role}"
164	      rbgv_jwt_sa_probe "${z_role}" "${z_iterations}" "${z_delay_ms}"
165	      buc_success "${z_role} JWT access probe passed"
166	      ;;
167	    payor)
168	      buc_step "Payor OAuth access probe"
169	      source "${RBBC_rbrp_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source RBRP: ${RBBC_rbrp_file}"
170	      zrbrp_kindle
171	      zrbrp_enforce
172	      rbgv_payor_oauth_probe "${z_iterations}" "${z_delay_ms}"
173	      buc_success "Payor OAuth access probe passed"
174	      ;;
175	    *)
176	      buc_die "Unknown access-probe role: ${z_role} (expected governor|director|retriever|payor)"
177	      ;;
178	  esac
179	}
180	
181	# eof
182

zrbte_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBTE_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "rbte already kindled"

  local z_dir="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"

  readonly RBTE_MANIFEST="${z_dir}/Cargo.toml"
  readonly ZRBTE_BINARY="${z_dir}/target/debug/rbtd"

  # Theurge-own colophons (routed by rbte_dispatch, not the RBK zipper)
  readonly ZRBTE_COLOPHONS="rbtd-ap"

  # Combined manifest: RBK zipper colophons + theurge-own colophons
  readonly ZRBTE_FULL_MANIFEST="${ZRBZ_COLOPHON_MANIFEST} ${ZRBTE_COLOPHONS}"

  # Suite-to-fixture mappings
  ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST=("enrollment-validation" "regime-validation" "regime-smoke" "handbook-render")
  ZRBTE_SUITE_SERVICE=("${ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST[@]}" "access-probe" "four-mode" "batch-vouch")
  ZRBTE_SUITE_CRUCIBLE=("${ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST[@]}" "tadmor" "srjcl" "pluml")
  ZRBTE_SUITE_COMPLETE=("${ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST[@]}" "access-probe" "four-mode" "batch-vouch" "tadmor" "srjcl" "pluml")

  readonly ZRBTE_KINDLED=1
}

######################################################################
# Sentinel

zrbte_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBTE_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbte not kindled - call zrbte_kindle first"
}

######################################################################
# Internal helpers

zrbte_build_binary() {
  zrbte_sentinel

  buc_step "Building theurge"
  cargo build --manifest-path "${RBTE_MANIFEST}" || buc_die "cargo build failed"
  test -x "${ZRBTE_BINARY}" || buc_die "Theurge binary not found: ${ZRBTE_BINARY}"
}

zrbte_resolve_suite() {
  local z_suite="$1"
  case "${z_suite}" in
    fast)     echo "${ZRBTE_SUITE_FAST[*]}" ;;
    service)  echo "${ZRBTE_SUITE_SERVICE[*]}" ;;
    crucible) echo "${ZRBTE_SUITE_CRUCIBLE[*]}" ;;
    complete) echo "${ZRBTE_SUITE_COMPLETE[*]}" ;;
    *)        buc_die "Unknown suite: ${z_suite} (expected fast|service|crucible|complete)" ;;
  esac
}

######################################################################
# Public functions

rbte_build() {
  zrbte_sentinel

  buc_step "Building theurge"
  buc_log_args "Manifest: ${RBTE_MANIFEST}"
  cargo build --manifest-path "${RBTE_MANIFEST}" "$@" || buc_die "cargo build failed"
  buc_success "Theurge built"
}

rbte_test() {
  zrbte_sentinel

  buc_step "Testing theurge"
  buc_log_args "Manifest: ${RBTE_MANIFEST}"
  cargo test --manifest-path "${RBTE_MANIFEST}" "$@" || buc_die "cargo test failed"
  buc_success "All theurge tests passed"
}

rbte_run() {
  zrbte_sentinel

  local z_fixture="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
  test -n "${z_fixture}" || buc_die "No fixture imprint — use tabtarget with imprint (e.g. rbtd-r.Run.tadmor.sh)"

  zrbte_build_binary

  buc_step "Running theurge fixture '${z_fixture}'"
  "${ZRBTE_BINARY}" "${ZRBTE_FULL_MANIFEST}" "${z_fixture}"
}

rbte_suite() {
  zrbte_sentinel

  local z_suite="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
  test -n "${z_suite}" || buc_die "No suite imprint — use tabtarget with imprint (e.g. rbtd-s.TestSuite.fast.sh)"

  local z_fixture_list
  z_fixture_list="$(zrbte_resolve_suite "${z_suite}")"

  zrbte_build_binary

  local z_count=0
  local z_fixture
  for z_fixture in ${z_fixture_list}; do
    buc_step "Running theurge fixture '${z_fixture}'"
    "${ZRBTE_BINARY}" "${ZRBTE_FULL_MANIFEST}" "${z_fixture}"
    z_count=$((z_count + 1))
  done

  buc_success "Suite '${z_suite}' complete (${z_count} fixtures)"
}

rbte_single() {
  zrbte_sentinel

  local z_fixture="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
  test -n "${z_fixture}" || buc_die "No fixture imprint — use tabtarget with imprint (e.g. rbtd-s.SingleCase.tadmor.sh)"

  zrbte_build_binary

  local z_case="${1:-}"
  "${ZRBTE_BINARY}" single "${ZRBTE_FULL_MANIFEST}" "${z_fixture}" ${z_case:+"${z_case}"}
}

rbte_probe() {
  zrbte_sentinel

  local z_role="${BURD_TOKEN_3:-}"
  test -n "${z_role}" || buc_die "No role imprint — use tabtarget with imprint (e.g. rbtd-ap.AccessProbe.governor.sh)"

  local z_iterations=5
  local z_delay_ms=1500

  case "${z_role}" in
    governor|director|retriever)
      buc_step "JWT SA access probe: ${z_role}"
      rbgv_jwt_sa_probe "${z_role}" "${z_iterations}" "${z_delay_ms}"
      buc_success "${z_role} JWT access probe passed"
      ;;
    payor)
      buc_step "Payor OAuth access probe"
      source "${RBBC_rbrp_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source RBRP: ${RBBC_rbrp_file}"
      zrbrp_kindle
      zrbrp_enforce
      rbgv_payor_oauth_probe "${z_iterations}" "${z_delay_ms}"
      buc_success "Payor OAuth access probe passed"
      ;;
    *)
      buc_die "Unknown access-probe role: ${z_role} (expected governor|director|retriever|payor)"
      ;;
  esac
}

content.text:
Let me address your question directly — pausing the implementation to review and respond.

I've been pattern-matching on three reference points: `rbtdrf_handbook.rs` (raw Command::new, no ctx, uses `RBTDRM_COLOPHON_*` directly) and `rbtdrc_crucible.rs` (uses `rbtdri_invoke*` via thread-local ctx, also uses `RBTDRM_COLOPHON_*` directly). The bash-side enrollment is in `rbz_zipper.sh::buz_enroll` which produces `ZRBZ_COLOPHON_MANIFEST`; that gets passed into the rbtd binary by `rbte_engine.sh` and verified against `rbtdrm_required_colophons` for each fixture.

What I've done so far:
1. Added 6 new `RBTDRM_COLOPHON_*` consts to `rbtdrm_manifest.rs` in two grouped blocks (Payor depot, Governor SA), mirroring the existing groupings (Foundry, Image, etc.)
2. Replaced the previous `Some(&[])` for `RBTDRM_FIXTURE_PRISTINE_LIFECYCLE` with the 6-entry list
3. Updated `rbtdtm_manifest.rs` tests — pristine-lifecycle no longer matches the "fast fixtures empty manifest" assertion, so I dropped it from that test and added two new tests
4. Imported the 6 consts in `rbtdrp_pristine.rs`

What I haven't done yet (was about to):
5. Promote `rbtdrc_with_ctx` from `pub(crate)` (was private) — actually I already did this 

The bit that does feel borderline: I'm calling `rbtdrc_with_ctx` from `rbtdrp_pristine.rs`. Conceptually that thread-local ctx storage is invocation-layer state, not crucible-specific — the `rbtdrc_` prefix is misleading once a non-crucible fixture uses it. Cleaner factoring would be to move `RBTDRC_CTX`, `rbtdrc_set_context`, `rbtdrc_take_context`, and `rbtdrc_with_ctx` to `rbtdri_invocation.rs` and rename them `rbtdri_*`. main.rs already calls `rbtdrc_set_context` for both crucible and non-crucible fixtures, so this is a real pre-existing coupling that just hasn't been called out.

Is the oddness you spotted (a) the cross-module use of `rbtdrc_with_ctx`, (b) the manifest grouping (two short blocks vs one), (c) something with the const collection I'm building (RBTDRP_FACT_*, RBTDRP_DEPOT_MONIKER_*, RBTDRP_BURE_CONFIRM_*), or (d) something else? I want to fix the right thing.

content.text:
Tree clean, commit landed.

## Summary

Pace ₢BBAAJ implementation complete — **commit `e59c49b8`**:

- **Bash + spec** (3 files): `RBGP_FACT_*` consts in `rbgc_Constants.sh`; `buf_write_fact` calls in `rbgp_depot_levy` and `rbgp_governor_mantle`; new "Payor Fact Files" section + linked-term mapping entries in RBS0
- **Rust** (4 files): cases 2/3 added to `rbtdrp_pristine.rs` using the fact-file invocation pattern (`rbtdri_invoke_global` + `rbtdri_read_burv_fact`); `rbtdrp_replace_prefix_lines` generalized to `rbtdrp_replace_env_fields`; `rbtdrp_git_add_and_commit` factored out; `rbtdrp_install_depot_project_id` added for case 3's mantle precondition; `dead_code` allows dropped from helpers/consts now that they're called; `rbtdrc_with_ctx` promoted to `pub(crate)`; six new colophon consts and dedicated fixture-required arm in `rbtdrm_manifest.rs`; manifest tests refactored
- **Paddock + docket** updated earlier in this chat (paddock commit `11ff6456`, docket reslate inside the same call) to reflect the fact-file pattern and case-3's own throwaway depot

Verification: `tt/rbtd-b.Build.sh` clean, `tt/rbtd-t.Test.sh` 58 passed (+2 new), `tt/rbtd-s.TestSuite.fast.sh` 97 cases green across 4 fixtures.

**One concern surfaced during implementation that you should know about before credentialed runs:** `rbgp_cli.sh` skips `zrbrr_enforce` only for `rbgp_depot_levy`. All other commands in cases 2/3 (`rbgp_depot_list`, `rbgp_depot_unmake`, `rbgp_governor_mantle`, `rbgg_list_service_accounts`, `rbgg_forfeit_service_account`) run full `zrbrr_enforce`, which validates `RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY` (min 1 char) and `RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM` (min 1 char + lowercase pattern) — both of which are blank post-marshal-zero. Case 3 already commits `RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID`, but neither case populates `GAR_REPOSITORY` or `GCB_POOL_STEM`. The cases compile and pass non-credentialed tests, but credentialed single-case runs (operator action) will likely fail at the first non-levy command unless one of: (a) `rbtdrp_install_throwaway_prefixes` is expanded to also stamp throwaway values for the two G-name fields, (b) `rbgp_cli.sh`/`rbgg_cli.sh` differential-furnish skip-list is expanded, or (c) cases edit-and-commit those fields too.

Sibling pace BBAAK (cases 4/5) is unblocked — the helper interface (`rbtdrp_install_throwaway_prefixes`, the `RBTDRP_THROWAWAY_*` consts) is stable and `pub(crate)`-visible.

Ready to wrap ₢BBAAJ?

message.content: Lets get back to the concern you raised.  OUght we go ahead and populate GAR_REPOSITORY and GCB_POOL_STEM?  Might need a couple new fact files to get those out.

content.text:
Yes — fact files are the honest path here. Here's the design and the question of where it lands:

**Design:** Add two fact emissions in `rbgp_depot_levy` (new RBGC consts `RBGP_FACT_GAR_REPOSITORY`, `RBGP_FACT_GCB_POOL_STEM`; matching `buf_write_fact` calls; RBS0 linked terms). Then factor the case-3 helper from "set DEPOT_PROJECT_ID" into "set all post-levy RBRR fields" — `rbtdrp_install_post_levy_rbrr(root, project_id, gar_repo, pool_stem)` — that edits all three fields in one rbrr.env rewrite, single commit. Cases 2 and 3 each call this once after their levy. The values written are the **actual** values the depot is provisioned with, not placeholders — survives `zrbrr_enforce` honestly.

**Why fact files over expanding throwaway-install:** the install helper writes contract markers (the `prl{c,r}-` shape distinguishes throwaway from canonical). `GAR_REPOSITORY` and `GCB_POOL_STEM` aren't markers — they're the actual depot's names, computed inside `rbgp_depot_levy`. Stamping placeholders would be lying to subsequent commands. Fact files preserve honesty.

**Scope question — where does this work land?** Three options:

1. **New pace** under ₣BB (e.g. `phase-0-rbrr-post-levy-completion`) — clean unit, benefits BBAAJ-as-landed and unblocks BBAAK's credentialed runs
2. **Roll into ₢BBAAK** — BBAAK already needs these fields anyway for cases 4/5, natural to treat as foundational for credentialed work; downside is BBAAK's docket grows
3. **Reopen-via-new-pace specifically scoped to BBAAJ-fix** — cleanest audit story but feels ceremonial

I'd recommend (2) — BBAAK lands the rbrr-completion helper as its first step and uses it; cases 2/3 retroactively benefit because the helper is now there next time the fixture runs (or you can patch them in the same pace). Want me to draft a BBAAK docket reslate that absorbs this, or open a fresh pace?

message.content: Do roll into a BBAAK reslate.  Okay to add another pace if you like.  Proceed.

Mirrors operator-flow file movements rather than extending the probe to accept arbitrary paths.
    
    Depends on BBAAB landing first.
    
    ## Work
    
    ### Pre-conditions
    
    - Throwaway prefix mechanism (locked in BBAAB design: `prlc-` / `prlr-`)
    - Each case pre-checks canonical role path empty (refuse with diagnostic if not — single-case independence requires clean canonical paths for the role being tested AND for governor, since each case mantles its own throwaway governor)
    
    ### Case 4: retriever-lifecycle (free + light read probe)
    
    - Apply throwaway prefixes
    - Pre-check: governor and retriever canonical RBRA paths empty
    - `rbw-aM` → mantle throwaway governor (RBRA lands in `BURD_OUTPUT_DIR`)
    - Move: `BURD_OUTPUT_DIR/$instance.rbra` → `RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE` → `RBDC_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE` (canonical)
    - `rbw-aC` → charter throwaway retriever (its RBRA in `BURD_OUTPUT_DIR`)
    - Move: `BURD_OUTPUT_DIR/$instance.rbra` → `RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE` (overwrite) → `RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE` (canonical)
    - `rbtd-ap retriever` → access-probe proves retriever permissions resolve
    - Cleanup: rm canonical retriever, rm canonical governor, rm assay
    - `rbw-aF retriever`, `rbw-aF governor`
    
    ### Case 5: director-lifecycle (light Cloud Build / GAR write probe)
    
    - Same shape as case 4 but with `rbw-aK` (knight director) and `rbtd-ap director`
    
    ### Registration
    
    - Add cases to `RBTDRC_SECTIONS_PRISTINE_LIFECYCLE`
    - Add required colophons to `rbtdrm_required_colophons` for `pristine-lifecycle`: `rbw-aC`, `rbw-aK` (`rbtd-ap` already in manifest from access-probe fixture, but re-declare for clarity)
    
    ## Verification
    
    - Single-case `retriever-lifecycle`: creates throwaway gov+ret, probe passes, cleans up cleanly; refuses with diagnostic if canonical role paths occupied
    - Single-case `director-lifecycle`: same for director
    - Full fixture on marshal-zero state: cases 1-5 all pass
    
    ## Out of scope
    
    - Cases 1-3 (BBAAB and sibling pace BBAAJ)
    - Canonical infrastructure setup (BBAAC)
    - Crash-recovery cleanup of orphan SAs (handled via soft-delete graveyard discipline)

input.content:
# jjezs_reslate BBAAK

## Character

Sibling pace to BBAAB and BBAAJ. Implements the more complex half of pristine-lifecycle: retriever lifecycle (case 4) and director lifecycle (case 5). Each case creates a throwaway governor + the role SA, exercises the credential via access-probe, then forfeits.

Includes the assay/canonical file movement choreography: SA-creator writes RBRA to `BURD_OUTPUT_DIR`; test stages to `assay/`; test copies `assay/` → canonical role path for probe; test cleans canonical and assay before forfeit. Mirrors operator-flow file movements rather than extending the probe to accept arbitrary paths.

**Absorbs rbrr-completion fix-up.** BBAAJ landed cases 2-3 with `rbtdrp_install_depot_project_id` setting only `RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID` after levy. `zrbrr_enforce` (which runs on every non-`rbgp_depot_levy` invocation per `rbgp_cli.sh` differential furnish) requires `RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY` and `RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM` non-blank too — both blanked by marshal-zero. Credentialed cases 2-5 will fail at the first non-levy command without those fields populated. K lands two new `rbgp_fact_*` files for the values `rbgp_depot_levy` computes (`z_repository_name`, `z_pool_stem`), generalizes the install helper to write all three post-levy fields in one commit, and back-patches cases 2 and 3 to use it. Cases 4 and 5 follow the same pattern.

**BBAAJ landed at `e59c49b8`** — `rbtdrp_install_throwaway_prefixes` and the throwaway-prefix consts are stable and `pub(crate)`. The thread-local invocation context is bridged by `rbtdrc_with_ctx` (now `pub(crate)` after BBAAJ); cases 4-5 use it the same way cases 2-3 do.

## Locked patterns

Implementation patterns are locked in the paddock under "Implementation patterns (locked during BBAAJ)". Read those before implementing. Reuse:

- `rbtdrp_install_throwaway_prefixes(root)` — landed `pub(crate)` at e59c49b8; call as first step of cases 4 and 5 (idempotent — no-op if already invoked in same fixture run).
- `RBTDRP_THROWAWAY_CLOUD_PREFIX` / `RBTDRP_THROWAWAY_RUNTIME_PREFIX` — `pub(crate)` constants; reference by name rather than re-declaring `"prlc-"` / `"prlr-"` string literals.
- Field-const pattern — BBAAJ extracted `RBTDRP_FIELD_RBRR_*` as private module-scope consts; mirror this pattern for any new RBRR field-name strings K introduces (see `RBTDRP_FIELD_RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY`, `RBTDRP_FIELD_RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM` below).
- Fact-file invocation pattern (BBAAJ-locked): tabtargets that emit identifying values write `rbgp_fact_*` files via `buf_write_fact`; cases consume via `rbtdri_invoke_global` + `rbtdri_read_burv_fact`.
- `rbtdrc_with_ctx` (now `pub(crate)` after BBAAJ) for thread-local context bridging — same shape as case 3.
- `rbtdri_find_tabtarget` (with role as imprint) for `rbtd-ap` — imprint channel.
- Git shell-out style: `rbtdrp_git_add_and_commit` (BBAAJ-factored helper) handles the `git add <file> && git commit -m <msg>` pair.

## Work

### Step 1 — rbrr-post-levy completion (foundational, lands first)

**Bash + spec edits (do BEFORE Rust changes):**

- `Tools/rbk/rbgc_Constants.sh`: add two consts inside the existing readonly block (next to the `RBGP_FACT_*` pair from BBAAJ):
  ```
  readonly RBGP_FACT_GAR_REPOSITORY="rbgp_fact_gar_repository"
  readonly RBGP_FACT_GCB_POOL_STEM="rbgp_fact_gcb_pool_stem"
  ```
- `Tools/rbk/rbgp_Payor.sh::rbgp_depot_levy`: after `z_repository_name` is computed (search for the local declaration), `buf_write_fact "${RBGP_FACT_GAR_REPOSITORY}" "${z_repository_name}"`. Same for `z_pool_stem` (search the body — assigned during pool-stem derivation around the worker-pool block). Place each `buf_write_fact` call immediately after the value becomes known so a partial-failure run still emits whatever was computed.
- `Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBS0-SpecTop.adoc`: extend the Payor Fact Files section (added in BBAAJ) with two new linked terms — `rbgp_fact_gar_repository` and `rbgp_fact_gcb_pool_stem`. Add their attribute references to the mapping section near the existing `rbgp_fact_*` entries. Apply CMK MCM linked-term shape (attribute reference + anchor + definition with `axpof_fact` voicing).

**Rust edits:**

- `Tools/rbk/rbtd/src/rbtdrp_pristine.rs`:
  - Add `RBTDRP_FIELD_RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY` / `RBTDRP_FIELD_RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM` private consts (mirror the existing `RBTDRP_FIELD_RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID`).
  - Add `RBTDRP_FACT_GAR_REPOSITORY` / `RBTDRP_FACT_GCB_POOL_STEM` consts mirroring the bash side.
  - **Rename** `rbtdrp_install_depot_project_id(root, project_id)` → `rbtdrp_install_post_levy_rbrr(root, project_id, gar_repository, gcb_pool_stem)`. Single rbrr.env read → `rbtdrp_replace_env_fields` with three entries → single write → single commit. Commit message: `"pristine-lifecycle fixture: set RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID/RBRR_GAR_REPOSITORY/RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM"`.
  - Patch `rbtdrp_depot_lifecycle_impl` (case 2): after the levy invocation, read all three facts; call `rbtdrp_install_post_levy_rbrr` BEFORE the `list-present` invocation (which runs enforce). Tee the three values to per-case files for diagnostics.
  - Patch `rbtdrp_governor_lifecycle_impl` (case 3): replace the existing `rbtdrp_install_depot_project_id` call with the new three-arg helper, sourcing all three values from the levy result's facts.

### Step 2 — Cases 4 and 5

#### Pre-conditions (per case)

- Each case pre-checks canonical role path empty (refuse with diagnostic if not — single-case independence requires clean canonical paths for the role being tested AND for governor, since each case mantles its own throwaway governor).

#### Case 4: retriever-lifecycle (one GCP project per run + light read probe)

- Call `rbtdrp_install_throwaway_prefixes(root)` (idempotent).
- Pre-check: governor and retriever canonical RBRA paths empty.
- `rbtdri_invoke_global(ctx, "rbw-dL", &["pristr01"], &[])` — levy own throwaway depot (distinct moniker from cases 2/3).
- Read all three post-levy facts (`rbgp_fact_depot_project_id`, `rbgp_fact_gar_repository`, `rbgp_fact_gcb_pool_stem`).
- Call `rbtdrp_install_post_levy_rbrr(root, project_id, gar_repository, gcb_pool_stem)`.
- `rbtdri_invoke_global(ctx, "rbw-aM", &[], &[])` → mantle throwaway governor; capture governor SA email via `rbgp_fact_governor_sa_email` fact.
- Move: `BURD_OUTPUT_DIR/$instance.rbra` → `RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE` → `RBDC_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE` (canonical).
- `rbtdri_invoke_global(ctx, "rbw-aC", &[], &[])` → charter throwaway retriever (its RBRA in `BURD_OUTPUT_DIR`).
- Move: `BURD_OUTPUT_DIR/$instance.rbra` → `RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE` (overwrite) → `RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE` (canonical).
- `rbtdri_invoke_imprint(ctx, "rbtd-ap", "retriever", &[])` → access-probe proves retriever permissions resolve.
- Cleanup: rm canonical retriever, rm canonical governor, rm assay.
- `rbtdri_invoke_global(ctx, "rbw-aF", &[&retriever_email], &[])` → forfeit retriever.
- `rbtdri_invoke_global(ctx, "rbw-aF", &[&governor_email], &[])` → forfeit governor.
- `rbtdri_invoke_global(ctx, "rbw-dU", &[&project_id], &[("BURE_CONFIRM", "skip")])` → unmake own depot.

#### Case 5: director-lifecycle (one GCP project per run + light Cloud Build / GAR write probe)

Same shape as case 4 but with `rbw-aK` (knight director) and `rbtd-ap director`. Moniker: `pristd01`.

#### Open question for implementation time (carried from prior docket revs)

`RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE` / `RBDC_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE` / `RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE` / `RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE` are bash-side derived constants from `rbdc_DerivedConstants.sh`. The Rust fixture either re-derives the paths from RBRR fields or queries them by sourcing rbdc — pick at implementation time. Re-derivation is simpler if the path shape is stable (e.g., `${RBRR_SECRETS_DIR}/<role>/rbra.env` plus assay equivalent).

Similarly: cases 4/5 need to capture the role-SA email + RBRA file location after charter/knight. Whether `rbgg_charter_retriever` / `rbgg_knight_director` already emit fact files, or need new ones (`rbgp_fact_retriever_sa_email` / `rbgp_fact_director_sa_email`), or whether the email is discoverable via the BURD_OUTPUT_DIR file naming — choose at implementation time. Prefer fact files for symmetry with the governor pattern (BBAAJ).

### Step 3 — Section + manifest registration

- Add section `pristine-lifecycle-credentialed` to `RBTDRP_SECTIONS_PRISTINE_LIFECYCLE` (after `pristine-lifecycle-simple` from BBAAJ). Final layout: §1 gate → §2 simple → §3 credentialed.
